---
title: "Tutorials"
description: Experimental Design and Data Analysis for the Cognitive and Brain Sciences
output:
  html_document:
    toc: false
    theme: cosmo
fontsize: 14pt
---

- <a href="tutorials/tutorial_01.html" target="_blank">Tutorial 1: Introduction to R and RStudio</a>
- <a href="tutorials/tutorial_02.html" target="_blank">Tutorial 2: Data Manipulation with `data.table`</a>
- <a href="tutorials/tutorial_03.html" target="_blank">Tutorial 3: Data Visualization with `ggplot2`</a>
- <a href="tutorials/tutorial_04.html" target="_blank">Tutorial 4: Data Wrangling</a>
- <a href="tutorials/tutorial_05.html" target="_blank">Tutorial 5: Random Variables and Probability Distributions</a>
- <a href="tutorials/tutorial_06.html" target="_blank">Tutorial 6: Inference, Sampling Variability, and Decisions</a>
- <a href="tutorials/tutorial_07.html" target="_blank">Tutorial 7: Effect Size, Power, and Evaluating Inference</a>
- <a href="tutorials/tutorial_08.html" target="_blank">Tutorial 8: t-tests</a>
- <a href="tutorials/tutorial_09.html" target="_blank">Tutorial 9: One-Way ANOVA</a>
- <a href="tutorials/tutorial_10.html" target="_blank">Tutorial 10: Repeated Measures, Two-Way, and Mixed ANOVA</a>
- <a href="tutorials/tutorial_11.html" target="_blank">Tutorial 11: Correlation and Simple Linear Regression</a>
- <a href="tutorials/tutorial_12.html" target="_blank">Tutorial 12: Multiple Regression</a>
- <a href="tutorials/tutorial_13.html" target="_blank">Tutorial 13: Final Project Preparation</a>
